tool_set_message.name: loadPaperNet
tool_set_message.description: Load the paper citation network (PaperNet). Must be called before using paperNodeCheck or paperEdgeCheck.

tool_set_message.name: loadAuthorNet
tool_set_message.description: Load the author collaboration network (AuthorNet). Must be called before using authorNodeCheck, authorEdgeCheck, or neighbourCheck on AuthorNet.

tool_set_message.name: neighbourCheck
tool_set_message.description: Get the list of neighbors of a node in a graph. Args: graph (str: 'PaperNet' or 'AuthorNet'), node (str).

tool_set_message.name: paperNodeCheck
tool_set_message.description: Get metadata for a paper node: authors, year, venue, n_citation, keywords. Args: node (str: paper title).

tool_set_message.name: authorNodeCheck
tool_set_message.description: Get metadata for an author node: co-authored papers. Args: node (str: author name).

tool_set_message.name: authorEdgeCheck
tool_set_message.description: Get papers co-authored by two authors. Args: node1 (str), node2 (str).

tool_set_message.name: paperEdgeCheck
tool_set_message.description: Check the relationship between two papers. Args: node1 (str), node2 (str).

tool_set_message.name: check_valid_actions
tool_set_message.description: List all valid actions available in the current environment.

tool_set_message.name: finish
tool_set_message.description: Submit the final answer. Args: answer (str or int or list).
